violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly and fully cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Rice was observed at 48 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Various food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The door to the outside, located in the side entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Bowl is being used as scoops in the ice machine. Utensils used to dispense TCS or non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowl was removed from ice machine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The walk-in freezer was observed in poor repair and non-operational. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area was observed water stained and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The floor in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

Soup was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by live roaches in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The hoods in the kitchen area have a heavy accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

Beans was observed held at 80 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

Working containers of various foods are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair(water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

The: 1.floors and walls, and storage shelves in walk in cooler 2.floors throughout kitchen and bar area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items, litter, and other debris were observed in the area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
